  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/drupal6-menu_block Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  menu_block is a drupal module which allows editors to display menu blocks,
  starting with any level of any menu.
  
  WWW: http://drupal.org/project/menu_block
  
  PR:             ports/135226
  Submitted by:   Nick Hilliard <nick at foobar.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2377    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/drupal6-menu_block/distinfo (new)
